detaileddescription.para: This function searches the Bad Block Table(BBT) in flash and loads into the memory based Bad Block Table(BBT).

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function searches the BBT in flash.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the BBT descriptor pattern to search.

briefdescription.para: This function scans the NAND flash for factory marked bad blocks and creates a RAM based Bad Block Table(BBT).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the Bad Block Table(BBT) read from the flash to the RAM based Bad Block Table(BBT).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the buffer which contains BBT read from flash.

briefdescription.para: This function writes Bad Block Table(BBT) from RAM to flash.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the BBT descriptor to be written to flash.
is the mirror BBT descriptor.

briefdescription.para: This function marks the block containing Bad Block Table as reserved and updates the BBT.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the BBT descriptor pointer.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the primary and mirror Bad Block Table(BBT) in the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the spare area of a page.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the page number from where spare data is read.
is pointer to the buffer where the spare data is filled.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Bad Block Table(BBT) descriptors with a predefined pattern for searching Bad Block Table(BBT) in flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Bad Block Table(BBT) if present in flash.

detaileddescription.para: If not it scans the flash for detecting factory marked bad blocks and creates a bad block table and write the Bad Block Table(BBT) into the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether a block is bad or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the block number.

briefdescription.para: This function marks a block as bad in the RAM based Bad Block Table(BBT).

detaileddescription.para: It also updates the Bad Block Table(BBT) in the flash.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the block number.
